name: io.github.Shxnque/quesen
title: Quesen
description: Deterministic risk-decision engine and Agent Settlement Protocol for autonomous agents.

headers.name: X-API-Key
headers.description: Quesen API key issued via https://senueren.co.za/quesen. Required for quesen.validate / quesen.simulate / quesen.report; not required for quesen.health / quesen.version.

io.modelcontextprotocol.registry/publish.notes: Deterministic zero-LLM risk-decision engine. Same inputs -> same output. Includes Agent Settlement Protocol (ASP/1.0) with HTTP 402 + USDC-on-Base for autonomous-agent settlement.
